calendar.matters:
Claim Of Exemption (Matter Calendared Due To Appearance By Judgment Debtor Re: Opposition To Claim Of Exemption That Was Not Properly Filed/Calendared By Judgment Creditor)
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Judgment Debtor KRISTINA SORIANO, Tel No. 415-609-4183 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Matter Calendared Due To Appearance By Judgment Debtor Re: Opposition To Claim Of Exemption That Was Not Properly Filed/Calendared By Judgment Creditor. Court signs order granting judgment debtor Kristina Soriano's claim of exemption, and releasing any monies held by the leving officer to the judgment debtor.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Rosie Noguera; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489
